Entry.JapaneseText: ミソとか食ってる奴いんのかよ。 田舎くせぇ。 マジありえねぇ
Entry.EnglishText: There are actually people who eat stuff like miso? What a bumpkin. I can't even believe that.

Entry.JapaneseText: なっ！ ミソをバカにしないで！
Entry.EnglishText: Wha--! Don't make fun of miso!

Entry.JapaneseText: おまえはピーチパイ好きなんだってな？ 貧乏人にはそんなもんが流行ってんのか？ 俺だったら一生食わねぇな
Entry.EnglishText: And I heard you love peach pie? Is that popular with poor people? 'Cause I'VE never eaten that in my entire life.

Entry.JapaneseText: ピーチパイを愚弄するとは……いい度胸だ
Entry.EnglishText: For you to ridicule peach pie like that... You have a whole lot of nerve.

Entry.JapaneseText: おい、ルーク。 あまり人の好みにケチつけるもんじゃないぞ
Entry.EnglishText: Enough, Luke. Don't be so mean-spirited toward other people's tastes.

Entry.JapaneseText: あぁ？ 田舎くせぇもんと貧乏くせぇもんにそう言って なにが悪いんだよ？
Entry.EnglishText: Huh? What so bad about telling it like it is to a bumpkin and a poor guy?

Entry.JapaneseText: もう、許さない！ ミソで鍛えた脚の威力、思い知らせてあげる！
Entry.EnglishText: Ugh, I'm not forgiving you for this! I'll teach you the might of legs trained with miso!

Entry.JapaneseText: ピーチパイにより鍛え上げられた オレの剣技と氷の力……味わえ……！
Entry.EnglishText: I will show you the taste of the power of swordsmanship and ice... trained by peach pie...!
